bead.title: operator-prompts: ADR — Operator-Prompt Beads as the Web Write Path
bead.description: ADR locking the trust model: each prompt becomes a bead with issueType=operator-prompt, drained by the existing execute-loop. Reuses worktree isolation, land-coordinator, post-land build gate, evidence ledger. Audit = the bead itself. Synchronous in-process execution rejected. Per locked decision: full agent toolkit allowed (not narrow scope).
bead.acceptance: 1. ADR-<NNN> authored with explicit alternatives considered. 2. Trust model: localhost OR ts-net WhoIs (extends requireTrusted). 3. CSRF, DNS rebinding, XSS-becomes-write vectors documented. 4. ddx doc audit clean.

events.body:
